title: alectryon ramiflorus
intro: Alectryon ramiflorus, also known as the Chinese parasol tree or the Chinese parasol, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Alectryon ramiflorus has been shown to have various health benefits, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to protect against diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves, seeds, and bark are commonly used in herbal preparations to treat a range of ailments.
